## Summary

Conflict-free follow-up to PR #674. PR #674 already fixed Canonical Identity by normalizing `identity_groups` into the renderer-compatible shape. This PR adds the second observed Story Ledger fix: Relationship Network rendering.

## Why

The Relationship Network renderer filters label-only/generic parties. That is correct for true descriptors, but the current filter can also drop valid extracted proper names when the extractor emits normalized lowercase multi-word names.

## Changes

- Adds a page-seam normalization for `relationship_network_layer`.
- Normalizes lowercase multi-word relationship names before they reach the existing label-only filter.
- Preserves true generic labels such as `unknown character`, `driver`, `guard`, `old man`, etc. so the renderer can still exclude them.
- Keeps the Canonical Identity normalization already merged in PR #674.

## Scope

Display adapter only. No extraction, scoring, database, artifact, or pipeline logic changed.

## Acceptance check

On `/evaluate/<jobId>/ledger`, valid extracted relationship pairs with lowercase multi-word names should render instead of producing a false `No qualifying relationship pairs found` state.
